title: Pip and the Sleepy Star Parade
subtitle: A gentle bedtime adventure among the stars.
coverIllustrationDescription: Pip, a tiny golden firefly, floats before a vast indigo sky. Sleepy stars nestle in soft cloud blankets. A silver moon watches over everything.

pages.illustrationDescription: A vast, hushed night sky in deep indigo and violet. Dozens of small stars curl beneath fluffy cloud blankets, wearing tiny nightcaps. The world below is dark and still. Moonlight spills softly across the heavens.

Close-up of Pip — a tiny firefly with warm golden wings and gentle eyes — holding a lantern that glows like a small sun. Pip floats before the sleeping stars, brave and kind. Golden light radiates outward in a soft halo.
Pip hovering beside a sleepy star named Blink, one finger to lips. Musical notes drift like golden dust. Blink's eyes flutter open — one, then two. The moment is tender, quiet, magical.
The Sleepy Star Parade — a sweeping arc of awakened stars marching across the sky, each trailing ribbons of gold, pink, and lavender light. Pip leads with the lantern. The whole sky sings with color.
Pip tucked into a cozy cloud bed, smiling peacefully. Through the round window, the last stars of the parade drift into the distance. The moon winks. Everything is calm, safe, and warm.
